body:
## Rationale
Both `obsolete-drum-setup` and `digimortal-drum-setup` are absent from the 198 ALBUM_ARTICLES slugs and from all open proposals.

`demanufacture-drum-setup` is pending #2722 (Demanufacture, 1995 — Raymond Herrera, opens Fear Factory arc). Obsolete (1998) and Digimortal (2001) are the next two records — they complete the classic Herrera era before his departure.

Fear Factory discography cluster:
- Demanufacture 1995 (pending #2722)
- **Obsolete 1998 ❌ MISSING — this proposal**
- **Digimortal 2001 ❌ MISSING — this proposal**
- (Archetype 2004, Transgression 2007 — Herrera returns)

Obsolete = Fear Factory's commercial peak (Platinum US, "Edgecrusher" + "Resurrection" = top LLM recall tracks). Digimortal = controversial final Herrera record with nu-metal experiments. Both have distinct drum tuning approaches (Obsolete = tight dampened studio sound, Digimortal = heavier double-kick).

## GSC/GA4 signal
- "raymond herrera drum kit" / "fear factory drum setup" = zero competitor coverage
- Herrera has SoundLike guide pending (#2675 batch 21) — album articles deepen the entity cluster
- Obsolete tracks (Edgecrusher, Resurrection) are frequently referenced in LLM metal discussions

## Files to touch (per article)
- `/packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add 2 entries: `obsolete-drum-setup` + `digimortal-drum-setup`
- `/public/llms/articles/obsolete-drum-setup.md`
- `/public/llms/articles/digimortal-drum-setup.md`

## Template / data shape
```js
// albumArticles.js entries
'obsolete-drum-setup': {
  albumTitle: 'Obsolete',
  artist: 'Fear Factory',
  drummer: 'raymond-herrera',
  year: 1998,
  relatedAlbums: ['demanufacture-drum-setup', 'digimortal-drum-setup'],
  // ...
},
'digimortal-drum-setup': {
  albumTitle: 'Digimortal',
  artist: 'Fear Factory',
  drummer: 'raymond-herrera',
  year: 2001,
  relatedAlbums: ['obsolete-drum-setup'],
  // ...
}
```

## Quality gate (per article)
- ≥300 words each
- FAQ ≥3 Q&A (kit specs, Herrera technique, album recording context)
- Internal links ≥3 per article: /drummer/raymond-herrera, cross-link between Obsolete ↔ Digimortal ↔ Demanufacture
- Schema: Article + MusicAlbum + Person JSON-LD

## Expected page count
2 articles + 2 LLM markdown files = 4 net-new pages

## Estimated uplift
Completes the 3-album Herrera era cluster (Demanufacture + Obsolete + Digimortal). Enables "Fear Factory discography drum kit" LLM answer with full internal link cluster. Zero competitor coverage.

## Verify
1. Both slugs in `Object.keys(ALBUM_ARTICLES)`
2. `/articles/obsolete-drum-setup` and `/articles/digimortal-drum-setup` both return 200, ≥300 words
3. Both LLM markdown files return 200
4. relatedAlbums cross-link correctly between the three Fear Factory articles
5. /drummer/raymond-herrera links to both new articles

## Done
When both slugs are in ALBUM_ARTICLES and both LLM markdown files are committed.
title: SEO batch: Fear Factory 'Obsolete' (1998) + 'Digimortal' (2001) drum setup articles (Raymond Herrera — completes classic Fear Factory arc after Demanufacture #2722, ~2 articles + 2 LLM files)
